# **Basics of Application Development A4**

**Submitted by 108781**

## **Introduction to Pandas DataFrames - Replicating an article in Markdown**

Three key files are included in this repository.

- Pandas.ipynb is a notebook used to replicate a web page about Pandas DataFrames
- Pandas.webp is an image used in the web page
- Pandas.html is the HTML version of the notebook
